title: ForeverCraft
description: This is a Vanilla+ Modpack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience while still being able to update your saved worlds without fear of corruption or loss of mod support.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff2ba9ff40ed7ec67c937ad835293465b31e969e.png)

### ForeverCraft is a Vanilla+ Modpack that adds a bunch of quality of life mods as well as some adventure mods.

The modpack is intended for those that may want to continue playing on their worlds on newer versions of Minecraft, even after some of these mods potentially cease to be updated further. This is great for "Forever Worlds."

Basically, if you start a world, and you have to get rid of every mod in this list, it should THEORETICALLY not corrupt your world and keep all existing structures, terrain, etc. intact. So please please please make backups before you try removing any mods as usual. I will not be held responsible for your corrupted worlds.

This is the official modpack niko uses for his "Forever World" series

### WARNING:

**Dungeons and Taverns adds a few enchantments that are not available in the base game. Removing the mod won't corrupt your save file, nor will it delete items with said enchantments. It will however remove the enchantments from all items that currently have them applied.**


## Modpack Contents


### Shaders

- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
